creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #0)

While the loop does get the same ra (return address) over and over I now doubt my "The cause has been tracked down to incomplete (and so inaccurate) .eh_frame information as shown below" specifics that I attributed the results to.

15360 and 153a0 likely should not need separate entries.
